evals.expected_output: Should detect TypeScript AND Go (polyglot project). Should create a new CLAUDE.md with the skill routing section. Should include ts:writer AND go:writer in the language writers table. Should NOT include py:writer or rs:writer. Should report what was created and which languages were detected.

evals.prompt: Set up the AI skills for this project.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Python. Should inject the skill routing section at the TOP of the existing CLAUDE.md, preserving all existing content below. Should include py:writer in the language writers table. Should NOT destroy or modify the existing Overview, Development, or Architecture sections.

evals.prompt: Re-initialize skills — we added some Rust to this project.
evals.expected_output: Should detect the existing AI-SKILLS-ROUTING marker. Should detect TypeScript (already present) AND Rust (new). Should ONLY add rs:writer to the language writers table. Should NOT regenerate the entire section. Should NOT touch the existing project content below the marker. Should report that ts:writer was already present and rs:writer was added.
